title: Reachable Nodes With Restrictions
titleCn: 受限条件下可到达节点的数目

testcases.input: n = 7, edges = [[0,1],[1,2],[3,1],[4,0],[0,5],[5,6]], restricted = [4,5] Output: 4 Explanation: The diagram above shows the tree. We have that [0,1,2,3] are the only nodes that can be reached from node 0 without visiting a restricted node.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: The diagram above shows the tree. We have that [0,1,2,3] are the only nodes that can be reached from node 0 without visiting a restricted node.

testcases.input: n = 7, edges = [[0,1],[0,2],[0,5],[0,4],[3,2],[6,5]], restricted = [4,2,1] Output: 3 Explanation: The diagram above shows the tree. We have that [0,5,6] are the only nodes that can be reached from node 0 without visiting a restricted node.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: The diagram above shows the tree. We have that [0,5,6] are the only nodes that can be reached from node 0 without visiting a restricted node.
